sentiment.reasoning: A CEO addressing investor concerns in an open letter indicates existing issues and an attempt to reassure, which can be a mixed signal depending on the content, but the headline itself suggests underlying problems.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
